name: WAG-10
description: The WAGC-3 , also known as WAG-10 , is a class of 25 kv AC electric locomotive rebuilt by Banaras Locomotive Works (BLW). It can deliver 10,000 hp (7457 kW). The locomotive was rebuilt from a WDG-3A diesel locomotive . The name stands for broad gauge ( W ), alternating current ( A ), goods service ( G ), and converted ( C ). This electric locomotive-related article is a stub .
